subcodes.first_line: O newly arrived scions of the Divine Garden! According to that which hath been made known through the testimony of His honour Ḥájí Nabíl, ye have acquired mastery in a noble art [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نورسیدگان باغ الهی از قرار معلوم بشهادت جناب حاجی نبیل تحصیل فن جلیل نموده
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @knowledge; recognition of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
